description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 8th; Weight â; Price +1 Bonus DESCRIPTION A shield with this special ability is designed to perform a shield bash. A bashing shield deals damage as if it were a bashing weapon of two size categories larger (a Medium light shield thus deals 1d6 points of damage and a Medium heavy shield deals 1d8 points of damage). The shield acts as a +1 weapon when used to bash. Only light and heavy shields can have this ability. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells bull’s strength; Cost +1 bonus
